abort.already_configured: Assist Sandbox is already configured for this assistant scope.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this Assist Sandbox entry.
data_description.assistant: The Assist exposure scope this sandbox runs under.

user.description: Expose a Monty-sandboxed Home Assistant code execution tool for one Assist exposure scope.
user.title: Assist Sandbox

init.title: Assist Sandbox options
init.description: Adjust code execution limits, visibility, and action permissions for this assistant.

data_description.action_domains: Restrict service calls to these domains. Leave empty to allow all domains when actions are enabled.
data_description.actions_enabled: Master switch for performing service calls. When off, hass.services.async_call is rejected.

data_description.execution_timeout_seconds: Limits execution time to avoid infinite loops or other unresponsive behavior.
data_description.helper_call_budget: Limits the number of service calls in a single request to avoid unresponsive behavior.

data_description.prompt_profile: Selects the source-controlled base API prompt sent to the model.

data_description.exclude_config: Drop entities in the configuration category.
data_description.exclude_diagnostic: Drop entities in the diagnostic category.
data_description.exclude_hidden: Drop entities hidden in the registry.
data_description.restrict_to_assist_exposed: When on, only entities exposed to Assist are visible. Other restrictions below still apply.

service_target_not_visible.message: Entity {entity_id} is not available to control.

service_target_not_supported.message: Service {domain}.{service} does not target the requested entities.

actions_disabled.message: Service calls are disabled for this assistant.

action_domain_not_allowed.message: Service domain {domain} is not allowed for this assistant.

call_budget_exceeded.message: The helper call budget for this request was exceeded.

config_entry_not_loaded.message: Assist Sandbox config entry {config_entry_id} is not loaded.

unknown_config_entry.message: Unknown or unloaded Assist Sandbox config entry: {config_entry_id}.

recorder_unavailable.message: The recorder integration is not available.

image_too_large.message: Captured image from {entity_id} exceeds the size budget.

unsupported_image_domain.message: Entity {entity_id} is not a camera or image entity.

time_window_too_large.message: The requested time window exceeds the maximum of {max_hours} hours.

logbook_unavailable.message: The logbook integration is not available.
